summary_en: 3,900,000 shares (0.7% of shares outstanding), ¥525M upper limit, open-market purchase via Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 15 – August 6, 2026. Rationale: human-capital investment (employee share grants) and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: UT Group's board of directors resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 3,900,000 treasury shares, representing 0.7% of shares outstanding, for a maximum of ¥525 million. Execution will occur via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 15 and August 6, 2026. The company states the acquisition is intended to support human-capital investment through employee share grants and to improve capital efficiency. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 4,700,825 treasury shares and had 596,492,920 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), both figures restated following a 15-for-1 stock split effective January 1, 2026.
